name: stn-skills
description: Professional Claude Code skill suite by Sven Thiermann. Includes: codebase audit (13-domain evidence-based repository audit), codebase quality bootstrap (CLAUDE.md + hooks generator), brainstorming (multi-lens design exploration), plan-writing (DAG-based zero-placeholder plans), plan-execution (checkpoint-verified execution with fidelity scoring), build-feature (end-to-end pipeline), and pipeline-handoff-validator (artifact contract validation).
